ksa_text: Knowledge of AI governance and regulatory compliance requirements, including the EU AI Act risk classification system, NIST AI RMF governance functions, organizational AI policy design, and conformity assessment procedures.

dcwf.top_element_label: Research the latest machine learning and AI tools, techniques, and best practices.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Research the latest machine learning and AI tools, techniques, and best practices.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-027 (AI and Machine Learning/Knowledge) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.445, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.445). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. ISO 8000 data quality management: data quality standards implementation, certification processes, ISO 8000 compliance oversight, data exchange standard management, and quality system governance.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.445, and AI and Machine Learning (AI) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI and Machine Learning KSA (composite 0.445)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of ISO 8000 Data Manager job postings does not surface this AI and Machine Learning competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
